text.title: lora-qlora Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lora-qlora as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Calling prepare_model_for_kbit_training AFTER get_peft_model instead of before.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The order matters for gradient computation. Reversing it silently produces corrupted gradients — the training loss appears to decrease normally but the model learns the wrong patterns. Only discovered post-hoc when inference quality is poor.

failure-mode.description: Training QLoRA on a CPU-only environment or a container without CUDA.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: bitsandbytes (the quantization library) is CUDA-only and fails to import on CPU-only machines. The error is non-obvious and happens at import time, not at init. Gate training on torch.cuda.is_available().

failure-mode.description: Using the dataset_text_field parameter in SFTTrainer with a column name that does not exist.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Raises a KeyError on the first forward pass, not at init. The error message is generic and does not reference the column name mismatch. Double-check column names in the dataset before launching training.

failure-mode.description: Merging a 4-bit quantized adapter into the base model and expecting the same quality as keeping them separate.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Merging quantized adapters produces quality degradation because the merge operation assumes the base is in full precision. Keep adapters separate for production.

failure-mode.description: Not setting the WANDB_API_KEY environment variable and wondering why training logs nowhere.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Weights & Biases integration requires the API key as an env var. If missing, training runs silently with no logging. Set WANDB_API_KEY or disable W&B logging before training.
